text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, they're sold out?! I neeeed these 
press-on nails though!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Stop. This other shop is selling 
them for, like, way more expensive. 
Are they for real?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I saw something about this 
on my newsfeed. Prices going up 
is called in… invention?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hm… that doesn't sound right. 
…Souffle-tion? Whatever, I am 
sooo done with these prices!!
